name: BWS Heating LLC
reason: No public website at all — only appears on Procore contractor directory and Facebook. Active licensed contractor in Teton County. Customers can't find them on Google without a site.

name: Corona's Roofing LLC
reason: Has a minimal placeholder-style website with very little content. Primary online presence is a Facebook page with 142 likes. Not ranking on Google for any local searches. Not BBB accredited.

name: Stan Czarniak Painting
reason: Old HTTP-only website (not HTTPS), clearly outdated design, no mobile optimization. Yahoo email address signals old-school operation. Losing leads to competitors with modern sites.

name: Valley Landscape Service
reason: Website copyright says 2015. Old HTTP site (not secure), clearly not updated in 10+ years. Not mobile-friendly. Established business since before 2015 with real contact info — high potential to want upgrade.

name: Hole Landscaping
reason: Website snippet literally reads 'Your Custom Text Here' — it's an incomplete template/placeholder site. Has phone and real service list but the web presence is essentially non-existent and embarrassing.

name: Jade's Heating & Plumbing
reason: Website is broken — requires JavaScript to load, throws an error for most visitors. 20+ years in business, excellent reputation (#1 in Jackson Hole by their own claim), but online presence is literally non-functional.

name: MD Roofing Wyoming
reason: Old HTTP-only website. Domain appears outdated with minimal content. No phone listed in search results — meaning customers searching for them can't easily call. Jackson Hole area roofer with real business history.

name: Atlas Roofing
reason: Old HTTP website (not secure). Uses Gmail for business email — unprofessional. Covers wide territory (Casper, Thermopolis, Lander, Cody, Cheyenne, Billings). A good website could dramatically increase their reach.

name: Dave Loden Construction (DLC)
reason: Old HTTP site with outdated design. Wyoming's commercial roofing specialist operating statewide. Website hasn't been updated in years based on visual design. Not mobile-friendly.

name: Palisades HVAC LLC
reason: Basic WordPress site built in 2021, footer says 'Developed by: Rockstar Web Marketing' but appears generic/minimal. Serves Jackson WY and Eastern Idaho. No phone displayed in Google snippets.

name: Tzompas Plumbing LLC
reason: Basic minimal website. Phone number in snippet appears cut off (307) 413 -). 20+ years in business. Real established plumber with weak digital presence not matching their experience.

name: Frog's Painting Services LLC
reason: Very basic small website with minimal content. Serves Jackson, Teton Village, Hoback, Wilson area. Relies mainly on directories (ChamberofCommerce, MapQuest) for visibility rather than their own site.

name: OR Landscaping
reason: Basic small site. Serves Jackson Hole with landscaping and snow removal. Limited web content — mostly just a contact form and phone number. Missing SEO, no service pages, not ranking well.

name: Five Star Construction Inc.
reason: No website found — only appears in the Star Valley local business directory (starvalleywy.com). Located in Etna, WY. Loses every customer who searches online. Ideal for basic $599 web package.

name: Star Valley Construction
reason: Basic website for custom home builder. The Star Valley directory lists this separately from the website, suggesting the web presence is minimal and not generating inquiries.

name: Star Valley Plumbing
reason: Basic website for Lincoln County area. 24-hour service but web presence doesn't reflect quality. Serving Alpine, Etna, Freedom, Star Valley Ranch, Thayne — large service area with weak online visibility.

name: Veteran's Plumbing
reason: Basic template website. Serves Star Valley and Jackson Hole. Veteran-owned business with strong reviews but very basic online presence. Name recognition but customers struggle to find them.

name: The Village Plumber (Bob Johnston)
reason: Listed only in local Star Valley business directory with no website. Solo operator / small shop. Loses all online leads to competitors. Easiest $599 sale — quick site with phone/services/contact would immediately pay off.

name: Baker Heating & Air Conditioning
reason: Basic website covering Fremont County and all of Wyoming. In business since 2007. Has a real email but website is minimal and doesn't convey the scale of their operation.

name: McG's Roofing
reason: Uses Gmail for business email — unprofessional. Basic template website created by local marketing agency. Serves NW Wyoming including Jackson. 20 years experience but website doesn't show it.

name: Prism Painting and Services
reason: Basic informational website. Women-owned business in Casper. Website is generic with minimal local SEO. Not showing up for key search terms. Needs a modern, mobile-first site.

name: JNC Interiors
reason: Basic WP site with Gmail business email. Offers drywall, painting, flooring, cabinets, home additions. Gmail address signals no professional brand. Website minimal — losing leads to larger contractors.

name: JB Elite Construction Inc.
reason: Basic website for Casper GC and remodeler. Does commercial and residential. Site appears thin with few pages and no blog/photos to build trust with new customers.

name: Inman Roofing
reason: Older static website. Long-established Cheyenne roofer but website looks dated. Multiple pages but design hasn't kept up. No gallery, no reviews integration, not mobile-optimized.

name: Kotch Electric & Home Service LLC
reason: Uses a Yahoo email address for business — signals highly outdated digital presence. Website is basic. Yahoo email tells customers this business is behind the times, hurting trust and bookings.

name: Electric MD LLC
reason: Very basic website — contact page only shows address and Gmail email, no phone visible on site. Gmail address is unprofessional. Customers have to work to find contact info. Easy win for a real site.

name: Marv's Plumbing & Heating
reason: Basic website for 24/7 Cheyenne plumber. Site appears to be a template with generic copy. Missing photos, staff info, service area pages. Well-reviewed on Yelp but website doesn't reflect reputation.

name: W.G. Dale Electric Co.
reason: Long-established Cheyenne electrician. Website is very old in design and not mobile-optimized. 814 Converse Ave address shows this is a legit established business — decades of work, outdated web presence.

name: Cheyenne Electric
reason: Domain is literally a keyword search phrase (electricianincheyennewy.com) — classic old-SEO trick that signals an outdated, non-brand-focused site. Very basic design. Customers don't trust sites like this.

name: Platinum One Roofing
reason: No website found — only on Yelp. Jackson area roofer with no web presence. In a high-value market like Jackson Hole, even a basic site at $599 would immediately pay off with one booked job.
